THE RETIREMENT MONEY MAP™

A Portfolio Is Not a Plan

Most retirees have investments. Few have a clear, coordinated plan showing exactly how their money will work throughout retirement. The Money Map changes that.

GET YOUR MONEY MAP →

"Most people plan vacations more carefully than their retirement income."

— Mike Stevens, IAR

Deliverable

Year-by-year visual roadmap

Covers

Income, taxes, healthcare, legacy

Updates

Quarterly

Projection Period

Through age 95+

Cost

Included

THE PROBLEM

Does This Sound Familiar?

You have no idea if your money will last

You've saved diligently, but you don't know if it's enough. Online calculators give you generic answers. You need a real plan.

You're guessing on withdrawal amounts

Should you pull 3%? 4%? From which accounts? In what order? Every decision feels like a gamble with your future.

Your "plan" is just a pile of statements

You have accounts scattered across multiple institutions, but no clear picture of how they all work together.

You can't see the tax impact

Every withdrawal has tax consequences. You need to know what you'll owe, not just what your account balance shows.

THE SOLUTION

The Money Map Framework

Your Personalized Retirement Blueprint

The Retirement Money Map is our proprietary planning framework that creates a year-by-year visual roadmap of your entire retirement — income, expenses, taxes, healthcare costs, and legacy goals, all in one coordinated plan.

This isn't a generic Monte Carlo simulation. It's a detailed, personalized analysis showing exactly how your specific accounts will be deployed over your specific timeline to fund your specific lifestyle.

30 Years Full retirement projection with year-by-year cash flow analysis

Your Money Map Shows:

  • Year-by-year cash flow projections (income vs. expenses)
  • Optimal withdrawal strategy from each account type
  • Tax liability estimates for every year of retirement
  • Social Security claiming strategy (when and how)
  • Roth conversion opportunities and timing
  • Medicare IRMAA thresholds and avoidance strategies
  • Portfolio longevity under different market scenarios
  • Estate and legacy projections

How it Works

It's just three steps

BECOME A CLIENT
Step 1) Organize ▾

Gather all financial data: accounts, income sources, expenses, pensions, Social Security projections, and goals.

Step 2) Build the Map ▾

Create your personalized roadmap with year-by-year projections, tax optimization, and scenario testing.

Step 3) Implement & Update ▾

Execute the strategy and update your Money Map annually as circumstances change and opportunities emerge.

COMMON QUESTIONS

Money Map FAQ

Learn how the Retirement Money Map works and what makes it different.

Request Your Money Map
